subcodes.first_line: O honored uncle! Thou hast gone to Ghawr and the banks of the River Jordan, while I have remained in these calamities and trials
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عموی معزز رفتی بغور و شواطی اردن و ماندم من در این بلایاء و محن تو گاهی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
